message:
feat(web): restore full WebSocket implementation and add module doc comment

Restore the complete WebSocket HTTP upgrade handler that was temporarily
stubbed during the SSE module introduction. The implementation provides
WebSocketUpgrade as a FromRequest extractor with RFC 6455 validation,
subprotocol/extension negotiation, accept key computation, and 101
Switching Protocols response generation. Includes ~30 unit tests.

Add a doc comment to the websocket module declaration in web/mod.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
